description_long: This object is a large, single-edged blade with a pronounced curve and a pointed tip, resembling a machete or falchion. The blade is metallic, dark gray in color, and features a distinct angular transition near the tip, giving it a slightly aggressive profile. The handle is cylindrical, appearing to be wrapped or constructed from a brownish material, and is capped at both ends with black, rounded guards. A prominent hand guard curves outward from the base of the blade, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for heavy-duty cutting or slashing tasks. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
description: A large, curved, single-edged blade with a dark metallic finish and a brown cylindrical handle, featuring a prominent hand guard. The design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, the brown handle, and the prominent hand guard.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's curve, handle, and hand guard from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the back, emphasizing the straight alignment of the handle and the blade's pointed tip.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, brown, capped with black rounded ends, no visible texture
